changelog:
v1.8.2 (Phantom Eye Elite Edition):
- [PHANTOM EYE] Early Exit: Implemented real-time aggressive reversal detection to close losing trades early.
- [SAFETY] Trinity Alignment: Mandatory trend synchronization across H1, M15, and M5 timeframes before execution.
- [ENGINE] Deep Strike Upgrade: Official release of PHANTOM SNIPER Engine v2.6 with enhanced multi-timeframe core.
- [FIX] Code Stability: Resolved 'vol_ratio' undefined error and fixed 'Close All' dictionary access bug.
- [VERSION] Milestone: Official release of the "Anti-Blindness" market awareness system.

v1.8.1 (Intelligence Boost Edition):
- [AI] Institutional Reasoning: Enhanced AI Advisor prompt to prioritize Smart Money Concepts (SMC) and Order Blocks.
- [SAFETY] Neutral Zone Shield: Implemented strict sentiment thresholds (±0.25) to prevent trading in low-conviction news.
- [SAFETY] Indecision Filter: Added "Anti-Wick" detection to block trades when market candles show high uncertainty.
- [FIX] News Accuracy: Improved sentiment analysis with "Tail Negation" detection (e.g., "Gold Rally Fails").

v1.8.0:
- [UI] Master Edition Sync: Increased UI refresh rate to 1s for real-time data accuracy.
- [UI] Premium Aesthetic: Added professional toolbar grip handle and full-width layout.
- [AI] Smart Sentiment: Implemented negation detection in news analysis to prevent false signals.
- [SAFETY] Low Volume Shield: Added automatic liquidity filter to block trades in "dead" markets.
- [AI] Fallback Reliability: Refined AI rotation to ensure instant model switching during API congestion.
- [FIX] Build Compatibility: Optimized resource path handling for PyInstaller/Inno Setup stability.
